description:
Antagonistic quality review of `hx-image` (T3-11) **after implementation completes**.

Review every file in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-image/` critically.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict, src/alt/width/height typed, loading (lazy/eager) typed, fit (cover/contain/fill) typed
2. Accessibility — alt text required (no empty alt unless decorative with explicit `decorative` prop), decorative images get alt="", loading state announced, axe-core pass
3. Tests — with/without alt, decorative, lazy loading, error state (broken image fallback), aspect ratio, 80%+ coverage
4. Storybook — responsive, with caption, broken image fallback, lazy loading demo
5. CSS — `--hx-*` tokens, aspect ratio via CSS, CSS parts (img, caption, fallback)
6. Performance — bundle < 5KB, native lazy loading preferred over JS intersection observer
7. Drupal — Twig-renderable, responsive images

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-image/AUDIT.md` with severity (P0/P1/P2). DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-image — T3-11 antagonistic quality review

summary:
## Summary: Antagonistic quality review of `hx-image` (T3-11)

### Changes Implemented
- Conducted full antagonistic review of all 5 files in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-image/`
- Wrote `AUDIT.md` with 17 findings across P0/P1/P2 severity tiers
- Committed and pushed audit doc, opened PR #332

### Files Modified
- `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-image/AUDIT.md` (created)

### Key Findings

**P0 (Blocks Merge):**
1. `alt` defaults to `''` — every `<hx-image>` with no alt is silently decorative. WCAG 1.1.1 violation; screen readers skip clinical/informative images with no warning.
2. No `srcset`/`sizes` support — Drupal responsive image styles (the primary consumer pattern) are entirely unsupported.

**P1 (Must Fix):**
3. Caption feature entirely absent — no `<figcaption>`, no caption slot, no `caption` CSS part, no caption story. Audit spec requires all three.
4. No ARIA live region on error/fallback container — AT users receive zero feedback on image load failure.
5. `rounded` prop and `_computeBorderRadius` have zero test coverage.
6. Default story `play` fn asserts `getAttribute('alt')` on a non-reflected property — always returns `null`.
7. Duplicate CSS Parts test adds no additional coverage over existing Rendering test.

**P2 (10 issues):** `inline-block` host default, missing tests for `ratio`/`fit`/`width`/`height`, no `decorative` prop, `rounded` Lit type mismatch, properties not reflected to attributes, error container collapses without height, missing lazy/responsive stories.

### Verification Status
- Audit-only PR: no code changes. No Playwright verification required (no behavior changed).
- `git diff --stat` confirms only `AUDIT.md` added.

### Notes for Developer
- The P0-01 alt default issue is the most impactful finding — it's a single-character fix (`alt = ''` → no default, or require alt) but the implications are large. Every existing consumer using `<hx-image>` without explicit `alt` is shipping inaccessible images.
- The caption feature (P1-01) will require a `<figure>`/`<figcaption>` refactor of the render tree, a new slot, and a new CSS part — scope this as a separate feature.
